{{Infobox concept
| name = Flourishing Disease
| introduced = cradle-13-threshold
}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The [[Flourishing Disease]] is a title for [[Jek’nan]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c6">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The [[Flourishing Disease]] reversed [[Jek'nan]]'s plan.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The [[Flourishing Disease]] uses infection as an attack.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The [[Flourishing Disease]] is also known as [[Jek'nan]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c6" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
[[Category:Titles]]
